title: bee backlog add auto-commits .bee/backlog.jsonl (scoped, conventional commit)
read_first: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs handleBacklogAdd (currently ~line 2483) — the function to extend
skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/worktree-store.mjs runGit/isOrdinaryCheckout (~line 417-427) — existing spawnSync('git', ...) style to match
skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs backlog.add example test (~line 1200) — runs in a plain tmpdir with NO .git; must keep passing unchanged
action: In handleBacklogAdd (skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs), after appendJsonl succeeds, add a commitBacklogRow(root, line) helper using the already-imported spawnSync from node:child_process: (1) check `git -C root rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree`; on spawn error, non-zero exit, or stdout.trim() !== 'true', return {committed:false, sha:null} without throwing — required so the isolated no-.git tmpdir fixture in test_bee_cli.mjs's backlog.add example keeps passing unchanged; (2) otherwise stage ONLY the backlog file (`git add -- .bee/backlog.jsonl`) and commit ONLY that pathspec (`git commit -m <message> -- .bee/backlog.jsonl`) so any other staged/unstaged changes in the tree are left untouched (P78's 'scoped' requirement) — never git add -A or a plain git commit; (3) commit subject `chore(backlog): <title, truncated to 72 chars with a trailing ... if longer>`, body lines with type/severity/layer/feature (when set)/detail (when set); (4) any git failure at any step (spawn error or non-zero exit) degrades to {committed:false, sha:null} without throwing — appendJsonl already succeeded and that must never be rolled back or turned into a command failure. Merge {committed, commit_sha} (commit_sha only when committed) into the returned result object (result: {...line, committed, ...}) and append a short ' (committed <sha7>)' suffix to the text line only when committed. Then run `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply` to propagate the edit into .bee/bin/** and the .claude/.agents/.claude-plugin/.codex-plugin mirror trees and refresh the .bee/onboarding.json managed-hash ledger — this is the repo's established source-to-mirror sync path (see scripts/ledger_parity.mjs's FIX_HINT); never hand-edit the mirrored copies.

truths: bee backlog add leaves `git status` clean for .bee/backlog.jsonl in a real git checkout (the row is committed, not just appended)
bee backlog add in a directory with no .git still succeeds exactly as before: no throw, JSON result gets committed:false
the commit touches only .bee/backlog.jsonl — any other staged/unstaged file in the tree is untouched

skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, .bee/bin/bee.mjs, and every plugin/skill mirror copy stay byte-identical after the onboard --apply sync (test_lib_mirror.mjs / release_manifest.mjs --check keep passing, ledger_parity.mjs --check keeps passing)
prohibitions: no hand-editing .bee/bin/** or any plugin/skill mirror copy directly — propagate only via onboard_bee.mjs --apply
no git add -A / no unscoped git commit

trace.outcome: backlog.add now auto-commits .bee/backlog.jsonl scoped to just that file (conventional commit), degrading cleanly to committed:false outside a git checkout
trace.verify_output: FAIL run_verify: 87 suite(s) — the ONLY failing suite is scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check: FAIL (0 missing, 0 added, 499 changed), all 499 are mode-differ mismatches, identical count/shape to the pre-existing baseline confirmed on main before this cell was dispatched (filed separately as backlog friction P2, not in scope here). All other 86 suites PASS, including skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (248 passed incl. backlog.add example with no .git, unchanged), scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs, scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check, and skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs (39 passed incl. the plugin-skill-tree sha256 parity checks, after render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + 5 targeted release-manifest.json sha256 corrections for the files this cell's edit + render touched). Manual smoke tests: real git checkout leaves .bee/backlog.jsonl clean after commit while untouched staged/unstaged files in the tree remain untouched; no-.git tmpdir degrades to committed:false without throwing; 72-char title truncation with trailing ... verified.
